action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 completed training a 512-dim 8-layer MPNN with virtual node for 30 epochs. Validation AP peaked at 0.2303 (epoch 27) and ended at 0.2292. Training loss continued to decrease steadily. The run took ~1442s (~24 min). No eval has been submitted for this checkpoint yet. Analysis: I need the test-set avg_precision for this stronger model to confirm improvement over the current best of 0.2017. With 4.4 hours and 20 iterations remaining, I have time for more experiments but must first validate this checkpoint. Decision: Submit eval for checkpoints/best.pt immediately. Keep all files unchanged since the pipeline is working.
